---
title: "ChatGPT Assignments to Use in Your Classroom Today"
date: 2023-11-03
---

[Link the to free book](https://stars.library.ucf.edu/cgi/viewcontent.cgi?article=1097&context=oer)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{< pdf-embed "ChatGPT Assignments to Use in Your Classroom Today.pdf" >}}
